よし、これだけ取れば十分だろう。<br>そろそろ基地に戻るか……:
Alright, that should be enough.
Time to head back to base...
しかし暇そうだからって、司令官に毒キノコ集めやらせるなよなぁ。<br>そりゃモン:
But they make me, the Commander, gather poison mushrooms just
because I look free. I mean, more poison for monsters is always good, but...
なんだ？ ここは妙に木が倒れてるな。<br>昨晩嵐でも起こったのか？:
What's this? The trees have fallen strangely.
Was there a storm last night or something?
あ～、最悪だ。倒木で道が塞がれてるじゃねえか……。<br>これじゃ先に進めないぞ:
Ugh, this is the worst. The path's blocked by fallen trees.
I can't get through like this...
回り道するか、無理やり乗り越えるか……。<br>どっちも面倒だなぁ……:
Should I go around or climb over?
Both are a hassle...
……！ 今の声は！？<br>まさか倒木の下敷きになってるのか！？:
...! That voice!
Don't tell me they're trapped under a fallen tree?
待ってろ、すぐに助けるっ！<br>確か、声がしたのはあの倒木の裏だな……！:
Hang on, I'll save you right away!
I'm sure the voice came from behind that fallen tree...!
……は？ パンダの赤ちゃん……？<br>まさか喋るパンダが助けをもとめて……いや:
...Huh? Panda cubs?
No way a talking panda was calling for help... No, that can't be—
なっ！？ パンダの後ろに人が倒れてるっ！？: What! There's someone lying behind the pandas!
大丈夫か、おいっ！？ <br>倒木に巻き込まれたのか！？ 怪我は！？:
Hey, are you okay?
Did you get caught in the fallen trees? Any injuries?
た、確かに……。普通に倒れてるだけみたいだな。<br>じゃあ体調不良か？ 顔色も:
Y-yeah, you're right... You just seem to have collapsed.
So are you sick? You look pale... What's the cause?
となると、急病かもしれないな。<br>すぐに前線基地へ連れて帰って原因を調べて―:
In that case, it might be a sudden illness.
I'll take you back to the base right away and find out the cause—
どうして……こんなこと、に……。<br>お、おなかへって、キノコ、たべただけなの:
Why... this is happening to me...
I was just hungry and ate a mushroom, but...
キノコ……たべたって言った……<br>ここに生えてた……きれいな、キノコ……:
Mushroom... Xiaolei told you Xiaolei ate it...
The one growing here... A pretty mushroom...
……きれいなキノコってのは、<br>この地面に生えてる、とんでもなく派手な色と模:
By 'pretty mushroom', do you mean that one on the ground with those
ridiculously loud colors and patterns?
たべたら……からだ、うごかなく……なった……。<br>りゆう、わからない……ふし:
When Xiaolei ate it... body... couldn't move...
Reason... unknown... Strange...
いやいやいや！<br>これは体を痺れさせる毒キノコだぞ！？: No, no, no! This is a poison mushroom that paralyzes you!
なんでビックリしてるんだ……。<br>この森だけにしか生えていないとはいえ、かな:
Why are you so surprised? Even if it only grows in this forest, it's a
pretty famous poison mushroom.
まあ、百歩譲って知らなかったのは仕方ないとはいえ、<br>こんな見るからに怪しい:
Well, okay, maybe it's understandable you didn't know, but still, don't
eat a mushroom that looks this suspicious...
だって……おなか、へってたし……おいしかったし……。<br>どく、あるなんて……:
But... Xiaolei was hungry... and it tasted good...
Xiaolei didn't know it had poison... *whimper*... Xiaolei is sorry...
ったく……ちょっと待ってろ。<br>簡単な解毒剤ぐらいなら、俺にも作れるから――: Honestly... hold on a second. I can at least make a simple antidote.
解毒剤を飲んだとはいえ、こんなにも早く治るなんてな。<br>なかなか丈夫な体をし:
Even after taking the antidote, you recovered this fast. You've got a
pretty sturdy body.
ところで、その『しぇしぇ』ってのはなんだ？: So, what's this 'sheshe' you keep saying?
かんしゃのことば。<br>シャオレイのこきょうの、お礼。: Word of thanks. A thank-you from Xiaolei's homeland.
ほー、初めて聞く言葉だな。<br>シャオレイといったか？ 遠方から来てるのか？:
Huh, never heard that before. So your name's Xiaolei? You came from
far away?
そう。わたし、シャオレイ。<br>ずーっと、とおくから、来た。: Yes. Xiaolei came from very, very far away.
１人で？<br>どうしてわざわざ、こんな危険な場所に？: By yourself? Why come all the way to a place this dangerous?
それは、おじーちゃんとのやくそく。<br>シャオレイ、強くなる。: That promise with Grandpa. Xiaolei will become strong.
うん。<br>あれは、シャオレイがまだ、こきょうにいたころ……: Yeah. It was back when Xiaolei was still in the homeland.
シャオレイ……我が孫よ。お主は物心ついた頃からこれまで、<br>わしと２人っきり:
Xiaolei... my grandchild. From the time you were a child, you have
trained with me, just the two of us, all these years...
よくぞここまで強くなった！ 代々格闘家を生業とする我が一族の中でも、<br>お主:
You've grown so strong! In our clan, no one has ever matched your
skill at your age!
……まあ、わしが何も教えんでも、<br>シャオレイは生まれつき強かったがのう。:
Well, even if I had not taught her anything, Xiaolei was born strong,
you know.
しかしシャオレイよ、お主の強さにはまだ足らぬものがある。<br>それが何か、わか:
But Xiaolei, your strength still lacks something. Do you know what it
is?
違うのう。確かに体は大きくないが、<br>それを補うだけの技は教えたつもりだ。:
No, not that. It is true your body is small, but I have taught you
enough technique to compensate.
いいか我が孫よ！<br>お主に足らぬもの、それは知恵よ！: Listen, my grandchild! What you lack is wisdom!
うむ！ 真の強さには、力と技――そして、知が必要だ！<br>だが、わしには力と技:
Indeed! True strength requires power, technique, and wisdom! But I
can only teach you power and technique! Honestly, I am not very bright.
そこで我が孫よ！ 外の世界へ出て多くを学び、経験し、賢くなるのじゃ！<br>そう:
So, my grandchild! Go out into the world, learn, experience, and
become wise! Then you will grow stronger! Explanation over! Off you go!
随分と思い切りのいい爺さんだな……！！<br>お前も、受け入れるのが早すぎるだろ: That's one decisive old man...! And you accepted it way too quickly!
だってわたし、強くなりたいもん。: But Xiaolei wants to become stronger!
そ、そうか……とにかくお前は武者修行の最中ってわけだな。<br>１人で故郷を離れ:
I-I see... So you're on a martial pilgrimage. Leaving your home alone
must be lonely, but you're doing your best.
あいやぁー。そうでもない。シャオレイ、１人じゃないから。<br>ね、パンパン、ダ: Aiyaa—not really. Xiaolei isn't alone. Right, Panpan, Dandan?
パンパンとダンダン、あいさつしてる。<br>よろしく、って。: Panpan and Dandan are greeting you. They say, 'Nice to meet you.'
あ、ああ……よろしく……。<br>というか、どうしてパンダと意思疎通できてるんだ:
Oh, uh... nice to meet you too.
But how can you talk to pandas?
ずっといっしょに育ったから、当たり前。: We grew up together, so it's natural.
ふたりといっしょに、わたし、つよくなる。<br>だからがんばれる。:
With Dandan and Panpan, Xiaolei can get stronger.
That's why Xiaolei can do her best.
ふたり、か……そうだな。: The two of them, huh... I see.
じゃあ心配はいらないな。頑張れよシャオレイ。<br>またどこかで――:
Well, no need to worry then. Good luck, Xiaolei.
See you around—
どうした、服の裾なんてつかんで。<br>まだ何か用があるのか？:
What's wrong? Grabbing my sleeve like that.
Is there something else?
おねがい。<br>わたしの師匠――先生に、なってほしい。:
Please.
Xiaolei wants you to be her master—teacher.
は？ 先生？ なんで俺が！？<br>見てわかるだろうが、格闘家じゃないぞっ？:
Huh? Teacher? Why me!
You can see I'm not a martial artist, right?
あなた、ひょろひょろでよわそうだけど、あたまいい。<br>毒キノコも知ってた。く:
You look skinny and weak, but you're smart.
You knew about poison mushrooms. Made medicine.
わたしが強くなるには、そういう知恵、ひつよう。<br>たくさん、おしえてほしい。:
To get stronger, Xiaolei needs that wisdom.
Please teach Xiaolei a lot.
あー……その辺に生えてる毒キノコを食うようじゃ、<br>最低限の常識は学ぶべきか:
Ugh... if you eat poison mushrooms growing around here,
you might need to learn some basic common sense...
でも、俺が教えられることなんて限られてるぞ。<br>もっと頭のいい人を見つけて―:
But there's only so much I can teach.
Find someone smarter—
いや。あなたに、おしえてほしい。: No. Xiaolei wants you to teach her.
あ～、あれだ。俺は弟子なんて受けつけてないんだ。<br>というわけで、じゃあな―:
Uh, look, I don't take disciples.
So with that, see ya—!
（う、動けないっ！ どうなってるんだ！？<br>服の袖をつかんだシャオレイの手が:
(Wha—I can't move! What's going on!?
Xiaolei's hand gripping my sleeve doesn't budge at all!)
あなたに、おしえて、ほしい。: Xiaolei wants you to teach her.
あ、あ～、悪いがそういうわけにはいかない。<br>俺は前線基地の司令官でな、これ:
Ah, uh, sorry, but I can't do that.
I'm the commander of the Frontline Base, and I'm busy as it is.
ぜんせんきち……知ってる。そこのしれいかんなの？<br>すごい。シャオレイ、見る:
Frontline Base... Xiaolei knows it. You're the commander there?
Amazing. Xiaolei has a good eye.
わたしの家、びんぼーだから、ぜんせんきちにいってお金もかせぎたい。<br>あなた:
Xiaolei's family's poor, and she wants to earn money at Frontline
Base. If Teacher teaches her, she'll get stronger—two birds one stone.
だから俺は忙しいんだって。<br>その手を離して……離しっ……くそ、ぜんぜん離れ:
I told you I'm busy! Let go of my sleeve... let go—... dammit, it won't
let go...!
先生じゃないっての！ あーもう……。<br>じゃあ仮にお前の先生になったとして、:
I said I'm not your teacher! Ah, man... Well, what's in it for me if I
become your teacher?
わたし、強い。力もある。<br>かならず、先生のやくにたつ。: Xiaolei is strong. Has power. Will definitely be useful to Teacher.
確かにすごい力で袖をつかまれてはいるけど、<br>そこまで言うほど強いのか……？:
You're grabbing my sleeve with incredible strength, but are you really
as strong as all that...?
んー、じゃあ試しに聞いてみるが、この大きな倒木を動かせたりするか？<br>道が通:
Hmm, well then let me ask: can you move this big fallen tree? I've
been having trouble getting through here.
なっ！？ 片手で持ち上げた！？: Wha—! She lifted it with one hand!
倒木がぽいっと脇に投げ捨てられる。<br>ズシンという重い音が響き、足元が大きく:
The fallen tree was tossed aside with a flick. A heavy thud rang out,
and the ground shook beneath them.
（こんな大きな倒木を、片手で簡単に持つなんて――！<br>小さな体でどんな怪力だ:
(To be able to lift such a big fallen tree easily with one hand...! What
incredible strength for such a small body!)
…………わかった、採用だ。<br>今日から俺のことは先生と呼べ。: ...All right, I'll take you on. From today, call me Teacher.
ふふっ。しぇしぇ。<br>よろしく、先生。: Fufu. Sheshe. Please take care of Xiaolei, Teacher.
